name: Active Memory
description: Runs a bounded blocking memory subagent before eligible conversational replies and injects relevant memory into prompt context.

agents.label: Target Agents
agents.help: Explicit agent ids that may use active memory.

model.label: Memory Model
model.help: Provider/model used for the blocking memory subagent.

modelFallbackPolicy.label: Model Fallback Policy
modelFallbackPolicy.help: Choose whether Active Memory falls back to the built-in remote default model when no explicit or inherited model is available.

allowedChatTypes.label: Allowed Chat Types
allowedChatTypes.help: Choose which session types may run Active Memory. Defaults to direct-message style sessions only.

queryMode.label: Query Mode
queryMode.help: Choose whether the blocking memory subagent sees only the latest user message, a small recent tail, or the full conversation.

maxSummaryChars.label: Max Summary Characters
maxSummaryChars.help: Maximum total characters allowed in the active-memory summary.

logging.label: Enable Logging
logging.help: Emit active memory timing and result logs.

persistTranscripts.label: Persist Transcripts
persistTranscripts.help: Keep blocking memory subagent session transcripts on disk in a separate plugin-owned directory.

transcriptDir.label: Transcript Directory
transcriptDir.help: Relative directory under the agent sessions folder used when transcript persistence is enabled.
